# truenas_alert_service (Data Source)

Provides information about an alert service on TrueNAS SCALE. Service-specific
settings are exposed as a JSON string because the shape varies per service
type (Slack, PagerDuty, Mail, etc.).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_alert_service" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "alert_service_type" {
  value = data.truenas_alert_service.example.type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric alert service ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the service is enabled.
- `level` (String) Minimum severity level (INFO, NOTICE, WARNING, etc.).
- `name` (String) Alert service display name.
- `settings_json` (String, Sensitive) Service-specific settings as an opaque JSON string. May contain sensitive tokens or webhooks.
- `type` (String) Alert service type (Slack, PagerDuty, Mail, etc.).
